overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist running through a historic Middle Eastern city at dusk. The character navigates narrow torchlit streets, passes through a large stone city gate, crosses a bridge over water, and encounters NPCs and camel riders along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential street with mud brick buildings

agents.ego_description: running through narrow streets between mud brick buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: tan-colored mud brick structures with wooden balconies and arched doorways
tall date palms lining the street
low stone wall with steps leading up to a building entrance
warm orange flame lighting mounted on the wall
wooden wheeled cart parked against the building

segments.scene_description: The protagonist runs through a narrow residential street lined with mud brick buildings and palm trees. Warm torchlight illuminates the left side of the path while the character navigates past wooden carts and stone walls.

events.description: entering the large stone archway gate that marks the city exit
moving from open street into the torchlit interior of the gate tunnel

agents.ego_description: running toward and passing through the imposing stone city gate

entered.detail: massive stone archway with wooden doors and decorative carvings
wooden stall with red fabric awning displaying goods

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a massive stone city gate. The environment transitions from open street to the covered archway tunnel with warm torch lighting, then emerges toward the outside. A market stall with a red awning is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open road outside the city walls lined with palm trees

events.description: camel with rider passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: running along the open road outside the city, passing other pedestrians and a camel rider

notable_agents.action: riding a camel along the road, moving in the same direction as the protagonist

entered.detail: tall defensive mud brick walls extending from the gate

segments.scene_description: Having exited the city, the protagonist runs along a wide dirt road lined with palm trees on both sides. The city walls recede into the background as the character passes a camel rider and other pedestrians in the open landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing over a river with water wheel

events.description: stepping onto the stone bridge over the river
slowing down to look over the bridge parapet at the water below

agents.ego_description: walking slowly across the bridge and pausing to look down at the river and water wheel

notable_agents.action: standing by the bridge railing looking down at the water

entered.detail: wide stone bridge with carved parapets crossing the river
dark flowing water below the bridge with reflections
large wooden water wheel attached to a building on the riverbank
decorative stone railing along the edge of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a stone bridge crossing a river, slowing down to observe the water below. A large wooden water wheel turns on the right bank while an NPC stands by the parapet looking at the water. The scene features overhanging trees and mud brick buildings visible across the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of a residential city street to an expansive riverside landscape. It begins with the protagonist running through a narrow path of mud brick buildings and palm trees, guided by the warm glow of torchlight reflecting off stone walls and wooden carts. As the character advances, the scene shifts through the shadowed tunnel of a massive stone city gate before emerging into the open air past a red-awninged market stall. The environment then expands into a wide dirt road where the city walls recede into the distance and the character passes camel riders under a canopy of palms. Finally, the path leads onto a stone bridge crossing a river, where the camera slows to reveal a turning wooden water wheel and mud brick buildings lining the opposite bank.
